race.description: The Bottle O Swan Hill Mdn Plate
race.comment: PRAVAHA (10) resumed from a spell last start with a sound third over 1300m at Seymour, which looked a stronger race than she meets here. With added fitness from the first-up run she looks the testing material. Patrick Payne is not renowned for having his triallers fighting out the finish, but that's what FULL DISPLAY (5) has been doing. That suggests she'll be forward enough to give this a shake. TARA'S CROWN (12) was good on debut then disappointed at the next couple before giving a hot fav a run for its money last time out. A repeat of that would have her in the mix here. FRENCH PALACE (4) is another first-starter from a stable not renowned for pushing them at the trials but she's placed at her only two and draws to get her chance. HEXED (6) is coming off a first-up fourth, when admittedly beaten a long way, but she'll be fitter for that and has the advantage of the inside alley.
